title: St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty
tagline: St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty, Kerala

overview.short: St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Joseph's Parish Shrine, Pavaratty is a Christian church located in Kerala, India. Located in a small town named Pavaratty, the church is popularly known as Pavaratty Palli. It is a parish of Syro-malabar traditions under the auspices of the Syro Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Thrissur.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pavaratty
topPlaces.description: Pavaratty is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Pavaratty is situated in the coastal area of Chavakkad taluk in Thrissur District.

topPlaces.name: Chittatukara
topPlaces.description: Chittattukara is a census town and panchayat in Paravur Taluk of Ernakulam District, Kerala. Paravur town is situated close to this village, just 2 km.

topPlaces.name: Peringad
topPlaces.description: Peringad is a village near to puvathur Town in thrissur District, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Paluvai

topPlaces.name: Elavally
topPlaces.description: Elavally is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is a part of Elavally Grama Panchayat and Mullassery Block Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Chittaattukara
topPlaces.description: Chittattukara is a town in Elavally village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The Elavally Panchayath Office and the Village Office are situated there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty?
faq.a: Stays in St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Joseph’s Parish Shrine, Pavaratty?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pavaratty, Chittatukara, Peringad, Brahmakulam, Venmanad.
